Bonus Draw Eligibility

Welcome to Yardstake Managed Marketplace

We take over the entire sales process, securely hold buyer funds via Stripe, and pay you out via direct milestone draws. Review the terms below.

1. Master Orchestration Agreement

Yardstake acts as the master project facilitator. We collect a 10% total deposit upfront from the buyer to lock in engineering and secure factory allocation. Yardstake holds remaining project funds in a master custodial account.

2. The 5% Platform Orchestration Fee

Yardstake deducts a flat 5% platform fee from Gross Transaction Volume (GTV) prior to rendering your milestone disbursements.

3. Photo-Verified Milestone Draws

As a certified vendor, you agree to utilize the Yardstake Draw Request Builder. All payouts (e.g. framing completion, MEP rough-in) are triggered strictly by uploading GPS/Timestamped verification photos within the Vendor Portal.

Unlock Milestone Payouts

Because we hold project funds in a master custodial account, you must securely connect your bank account via Stripe to receive your automated draw requests.

Verify Identity & Routing

You will be securely redirected to Stripe to provide your business EIN, owner identity, and routing numbers.

Standard 2-3 Day Clearing Times Apply

Base Pricing & Options

Set the "Fixed Box" net pricing for your primary model. This exact pricing gets quoted directly in the buyer's e-commerce flow.

$
$

The 5% platform fee will be dynamically added onto this base rate in the consumer-facing checkout. You do not need to mark these prices up.

Don't have all your pricing handy? You can add additional models, trim packages, and options from your dashboard later.

Preferred GC Assignment

Target: $500 Bonus

Provide the contact info for the local site contractor who handles your foundation pours and crane rigging. They will be invited to handle "Track B" on your local orders.

You can skip this and complete it later from your dashboard.
